# DeerFlow Site

Updated: 2026-06-12
Canonical: https://deerflow.site/
Support: support@aigeamy.com

## Summary
DeerFlow Site is a Managed DeerFlow AI research agent workspace for teams planning deep research agent runs, coding missions, and approval checkpoints. It helps users get a mission-ready DeerFlow workflow with pricing, examples, privacy, and not-found safety.

## Core pages
- Home: https://deerflow.site/
- Pricing: https://deerflow.site/pricing/
- Checkout fallback: https://deerflow.site/checkout/
- Privacy: https://deerflow.site/privacy/
- Terms: https://deerflow.site/terms/

## Traffic intent pages
- DeerFlow AI research agent: https://deerflow.site/deerflow-ai-research-agent/ - DeerFlow AI Research Agent Workflow

## Pricing anchors
- Lab: $39/mo public planning anchor
- Flow: $99/mo public planning anchor
- Ops: $249/mo public planning anchor
